mapper.select: SELECT id, resume_name,user_id, name, phone, email, age, gender,skills, self_description, job_intention, city, salary_min, salary_max,character_avatar, job_type, industry, available_from, graduation_school, total_work_years, max_education, created_at, updated_at FROM resumes WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resumes (resume_name,user_id, name, phone, email, age, gender,skills, self_description, job_intention, city, salary_min, salary_max, job_type, industry, available_from, graduation_school, total_work_years, max_education, created_at, updated_at,character_avatar,is_default) VALUES (#{resumeName},#{userId}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{age}, #{gender},#{skills}, #{selfDescription}, #{jobIntention}, #{city}, #{salaryMin}, #{salaryMax}, #{jobType}, #{industry}, #{availableFrom}, #{graduationSchool}, #{totalWorkYears}, #{maxEducation}, NOW(), NOW(),#{characterAvatar},#{isDefault})
mapper.select:
SELECT id, resume_name, user_id, name, phone, email, age, gender, skills, self_description, job_intention, city, salary_min, salary_max, character_avatar, job_type, industry, available_from, graduation_school, total_work_years, max_education, created_at, updated_at FROM resumes WHERE id IN
#{id}
SELECT id, resume_id, school, major, education, description,start_time, end_time, created_at FROM resume_educations WHERE resume_id = #{resumeId} ORDER BY start_time DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO resume_educations (resume_id, school, major, education, description,start_time, end_time, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.resumeId}, #{item.school}, #{item.major}, #{item.education}, #{item.description},#{item.startTime}, #{item.endTime}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, resume_id, company, position, start_time, end_time, description, created_at FROM resume_experiences WHERE resume_id = #{resumeId} ORDER BY start_time DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO resume_experiences (resume_id, company, position, start_time, end_time, description, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.resumeId}, #{item.company}, #{item.position}, #{item.startTime}, #{item.endTime}, #{item.description}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, resume_id, name, role, start_time, end_time, description, created_at FROM resume_projects WHERE resume_id = #{resumeId} ORDER BY start_time DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO resume_projects (resume_id, name, role, start_time, end_time, description, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.resumeId}, #{item.name}, #{item.role}, #{item.startTime}, #{item.endTime}, #{item.description}, NOW())

INSERT INTO resume_educations (resume_id, school, major, education, description, start_time, end_time, created_at) VALUES (#{resumeId}, #{school}, #{major}, #{education}, #{description}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, NOW())

INSERT INTO resume_experiences (resume_id, company, position, start_time, end_time, description, created_at) VALUES (#{resumeId}, #{company}, #{position}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{description}, NOW())
INSERT INTO resume_projects (resume_id, name, role, start_time, end_time, description, created_at) VALUES (#{resumeId}, #{name}, #{role}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{description}, NOW())
mapper.select:
SELECT r.id, r.user_id AS userId, u.username, r.resume_name AS resumeName, r.name, r.phone, r.email, r.age, r.gender, r.skills, r.self_description AS selfDescription, r.job_intention AS jobIntention, r.city, r.salary_min AS salaryMin, r.salary_max AS salaryMax, r.character_avatar AS characterAvatar, r.is_default AS isDefault, r.job_type AS jobType, r.industry, r.available_from AS availableFrom, r.graduation_school AS graduationSchool, r.total_work_years AS totalWorkYears, r.max_education AS maxEducation, DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt, DATE_FORMAT(r.updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updatedAt FROM resumes r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE 1=1
AND r.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND r.job_intention LIKE CONCAT('%', #{jobIntention}, '%')
ORDER BY r.is_default DESC, r.updated_at DESC
